page_metadata.biotools__summary: RepeatExplorer2 includes utilities for Graph-based clustering and characterization of repetitive sequences in next-generation sequencing data and tools for the detection of transposable element protein coding domains.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RepeatExplorer2 includes utilities for Graph-based clustering and characterization of repetitive sequences in next-generation sequencing data and tools for the detection of transposable element protein coding domains.
